meta.title: BMW N40/N42/N43/N45/N46 Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost

hero.h1: BMW N40/N42/N43/N45/N46 Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The N40–N46 family are BMW's 2000s four-cylinder petrols — cheap to run, but timing chain guide failure is the defining risk. Backed by consistent UK marketplace demand [ESTIMATED].

rows.value: 18 models (1, 3, 5 Series, X1, X3, Z4, MINI)

rows.metric: Confidence: 80% confidence — based on established specialist knowledge, owner forums, and parts‑supply validation [ESTIMATED].

rows.value: 3★ × 4 = 12 — timing chain guide failure is the major risk across all variants

rows.metric: Recon supply midpoint ~£3,250 (£2,500–£4,000) → falls in £3,000–£4,999 band

rows.value: Timing chain replacement is involved; valve‑train repairs (N43) add complexity

rows.metric: Common engines; parts abundant for N42/N46; N43 direct‑injection parts scarcer

rows.value: Recon cost as % of lowest host‑value (£4,500) ~72% → watch threshold

rows.metric: Sum of five rows above — corrected total
rows.value: One-line verdict: These BMW four‑pots are economical and capable — but timing chain guide failures are almost guaranteed — buy only with documented chain replacement.

rows.metric: Best for: Budget‑conscious buyers wanting a cheap‑to‑run BMW with good parts availability.
rows.value: Avoid if: No timing chain history above 70,000 miles; avoid N43 without injector history.

rows.metric: BMW N40/N42/N43/N45/N46 — Where It's Fitted (BMW Models)
* N45 — 1.8L, south‑east Asian market (rare in UK)
rows.value: Exclusive to BMW Group (including MINI) — no cross‑brand fitment outside the group.
Labour estimate: Fitting an N40–N46 engine typically takes 10–14 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [ESTIMATED].

rows.metric: CTA line: → Compare BMW N40/N42/N43/N45/N46 engine prices from UK specialists
1. How much does a BMW N40–N46 engine replacement cost?
rows.value: A reconditioned N42/N46 typically costs £2,500–£4,000 supply only [ESTIMATED], with N43 direct‑injection variants at the higher end. Fitting adds £650–£1,300. Use our calculator for a figure specific to your car.

rows.metric: 2. Is the BMW N40–N46 a reliable engine?
rows.value: The N40–N46 family earns 3★ out of 5 [ESTIMATED]. The N42 and N46 are well‑understood and reliable if the timing chain guides have been replaced; the direct‑injection N43 is more problematic, with injector and HPFP issues.

rows.metric: 3. What is the most common BMW N40–N46 failure?
rows.value: Timing chain guide failure is the most serious — the plastic guides become brittle, break, and allow chain slack, causing valve‑to‑piston contact. Typically occurs from 60,000–100,000 miles. The N43 also suffers HPFP and injector failure.

rows.metric: 4. Which BMW models use the N40–N46 engines?
rows.value: The N42/N46 powers the E46 318i/320i, E90 318i/320i, E87 116i/118i/120i, E84 X1 18i/20i, E83 X3 2.0i, and E60 520i. The N43 replaced the N46 in some markets from 2007.

rows.metric: 5. How long does the BMW N40–N46 engine last?
rows.value: With preventative timing chain guide replacement at 70,000 miles and regular 8,000‑mile oil changes, an N42/N46 can exceed 150,000–180,000 miles. N43 longevity is similar but injector costs arrive from 80,000 miles.

rows.metric: Why UK N40–N46 Owners Trust bmwengine.uk
rows.value: * Trusted Suppliers — Every garage and engine rebuilder in our network is vetted, rated and reviewed by real N40–N46 owners, as part of the Engine Finders network.

rows.metric: * Compare Companies — We compare actual quotes from UK specialists so you see real fitted prices — not just advertised supply‑only rates.
rows.value: * UK Coverage — Our specialist network covers England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland, with BMW four‑cylinder expertise in every region.

rows.metric: Final CTA: Find the best BMW N40–N46 engine replacement UK drivers rely on. Compare real prices from trusted specialists on EnginesMarket today and get back on the road with confidence.
rows.value: CTA Button: Compare BMW N40/N42/N43/N45/N46 Engine Prices Now →
